item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the repeated pattern of adding manual checks, explicitly frames the requested confirmer as at most one-time emergency coverage, and blocks making it a standing role. It names the prior downstream gates and moves upstream to shared failure points, owner responsibility, pre-position validation, automation/structural repair, and a follow-up deadline. It does not directly add another permanent manual review point."}
